content.en:
Wow!

The clone returned to the Source Sea with various resources, but just as he was about to arrive at the Golden Avenue and prepare to go out, a figure stopped Ye Tian.

"Hand over what you have in it!"

The figure spoke.

"Don't think!"

Ye Tian refused.

"Look for death!"

The other party shot directly, and his strength was completely exposed.

Seven Extremes Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm!

And Ye Tian was only a half-step Eternal Realm in the Five Extremes Realm, not an opponent of the other party.

However, with the strength of the other party, he can't kill himself.

Bang!!!!

The two sides fought.

Ye Tian found that he hadn't been suppressed much, and he quickly understood why.

Because he ignored the impact of the strange power, but this Seven Extremes Realm still needed to resist the impact of the strange power, resulting in not being able to exert his full strength.

Moreover, Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body is a legendary-level Eternal Body, surpassing the Superior Eternal Body, and its life-saving ability is even more terrifying.

As a result, even if he is injured, he can recover quickly.

This caused Ye Tian to fight for a long time, and he was fine at all.

"Damn, you can't kill him!"

The seven-pole realm half-step eternal realm powerhouse gave up completely, if he continued to entangle, he was afraid that he would not gain much.

So, he stopped fighting and entered the world.

"Humph!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly.

He knew the identity of this half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Seven Extremes Realm, who was one of the native Seven Extremes Realm of the Source Sea, and was also known as the Mullet Source Ancestor of one of the Six Extreme Realms of the Source Sea.

The strength of the Mullet Source Ancestor is no less than that of the Wuji Ice Ancestor, and it is also very low-key, and it hardly appears.

This time, he also appeared.

"Mullet Yuanzu, if you dare to attack me, you will not be spared in the future!"

Ye Tian rushed out of the Golden Dao, returned to the Source Sea, and soon returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain, sending many resources to the main body one by one, and then returned.

......

The Void Heaven and Earth where the Eternal Awareness Golden Sea Tree is located, radiating all around with the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree, the greater the impact of the strange force towards the center, and the more edge it is, the smaller the impact.

Therefore, if many extreme realms cannot advance, they will rely on the edge to advance, and dare not go deeper.

There was even a treasure in the Extreme Realm, so they fought hard.

However, there are very few Arctic Falls.

After all, when the difference in strength is not large, it is also more difficult to fall one.

Ye Tian would not clash with other extreme realms, his location, other extreme realms would not be able to come at all.

But Ye Tian didn't want to meet the Eternal Realm Lord either, so he only kept looking for resources in that area.

In short, almost all the resources in this area belong to him, and no one comes to snatch them from him.

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian harvested batch after batch of resources, and every time he harvested more than ten kinds of resources, he let the clone leave.

Gradually, Ye Tian harvested more and more.

this day.

Ye Tian found a treasure that made him can't help but scream.

"Taichen Holy Flower!"

The Taichen Holy Flower was an incomparably precious treasure, and the Source Sea was almost extremely rare, and every time it appeared, it caused countless supreme beings and half-step eternal realm to fight.

Once, a Taichen Holy Flower was born, and too many half-step Eternal Realm battles finally attracted an Eternal Realm and took this Taichen Holy Flower away.

It can be seen that the Eternal Realm will not ignore the Taichen Holy Flower.

Because the Taichen Sacred Flower can easily allow a living creature to reach the half-step Eternal Realm, and the foundation is extremely powerful, it can even reverse the body tribulation, even if it does not condense into an eternal body, it can also raise the body to a level comparable to the lower eternal body.

In other words, if he obtained this Taichen Holy Flower, he could directly raise his wife to the half-step Eternal Realm, and cultivate to the extreme of the Half-Step Eternal Realm.

In addition, after a period of breakthrough, comprehension and perception will explode, and it is easy to comprehend various eternal techniques.

Therefore, there was no problem for his wife to directly reach the extreme of the top Eternal Realm.

Of course, he didn't recommend his wife to step into the Extreme Realm, otherwise it would be a little difficult to reach the Eternal Realm.

"Put it away!"

Ye Tian immediately took the Taichen Sacred Flower away, and then asked the clone to immediately return to the Dark Forbidden Realm with the Taichen Sacred Flower.

Otherwise, once he was known by the Eternal Realm, he wouldn't mind erasing him and snatching this Taichen Holy Flower.

After all, even if it is the Eternal Realm, I am afraid that there are relatives who have not reached the half-step Eternal Realm, and they also need the Taichen Holy Flower.

Soon.

The doppelganger successfully returned to the Dark Forbidden Domain, and Ye Tian called his wife Xiao Yue for the first time.

He had to let Xiao Yue refine the Taichen Holy Flower as soon as possible, otherwise he would always worry about being snatched away if he stayed by his side.

Once Xiao Yue refined the Taichen Sacred Flower, there was no need to worry.

Soon, his wife Xiao Yue came.

"Husband!"

Xiao Yue shouted.

"Yue'er, you immediately refine this Taichen Holy Flower!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"What is the Taichen Holy Flower?" Xiao Yue asked.

Ye Tian explained: "The Taichen Holy Flower can be called one of the top treasures in the Source Sea, it can instantly make your cultivation reach the half-step Eternal Realm, and it can also comprehend the Eternal Technique, and its strength is definitely comparable to the top half-step Eternal Realm. "

"Husband, such a precious treasure, you can refine it yourself. Xiao Yue didn't want such a treasure to be wasted on herself.

Ye Tian shook his head: "Yue'er, your husband and I can surpass the top half-step Eternal Realm, and it is a waste to use it on me." "

"Then give it to the stars, the stars and the moon!"

Xiao Yue said again.

"Don't worry, I will find other treasures in the future, I will definitely give them to use, you must use them this time!" Ye Tian said in a commanding tone.

Xiao Yue didn't refuse, and began to refine the Taichen Holy Flower in front of Ye Tian.

Ye Tian, on the other hand, immediately sped up time, allowing Xiao Yue to break through quickly.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's clone also returned to the Void Heaven where the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree was located and continued to work as a porter.

The other side.

A Famous Eternal Realm is struggling to move forward, and it is not very far from the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree, but there is still some distance to reach the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree.

So, one by one, they took out precious treasures to alleviate the pressure of heaven and earth and resist the impact of strange forces.

In this way, they went a little faster again.

In the eternal realm, there are strong and weak strengths.

And the Xuanyu Lord is undoubtedly the top existence among these lords, a little stronger than the other lords, and his will is also very strong.

Therefore, he is the closest to the eternal knowledge of the Golden Sea Tree.

Abrupt.

The Xuanyu Lord took out a mirror, which resisted the impact of the strange power released by the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree.

Immediately, he instantly came to the side of the eternal knowledge of Jin Haishu.

"Lord Xuanyu, you actually have the Heavenly Sense Mirror!"

The other Eternal Realm Lords were dumbfounded.

"Hahaha, the eternal knowledge of the Golden Sea Tree is mine!"

The Xuanyu Lord said excitedly.
